title: Hallmark Mothers Day Card, Mothers Day Card for Mum, 3D, Pop Up Mothers Day Card, Florals & Butterflies, Pink, Purple, Gold
features: MOTHERS DAY CARD: Send a thankful note and appreciation for all she does, and celebrate Mother's Day with this gorgeous 3D and pop up card, from our Paper Wonder collection. The perfect way to show your Mum or other relative just how much you care

MOTHERS DAY CARD: Printed on high-quality board, this card pops-up into a 3D diorama of flowers and butterflies design. This card features metallic gold foil details, die-cut details, with the message 'Thankful for you' on the front
HIGH QUALITY CONSTRUCTION & FULLY RECYCLABLE: This card is fully recyclable, and made of material from well-managed, FSC-certified forests and other controlled sources

MOTHER DAY MESSAGE: Write a special Mothers Day greeting to wish them a wonderful day and accompany it with our message, 'You make my life better just by being a part of it'. The perfect way to make sure their day is extra special

SIZE: The constructed card measures H9.9cm by W23.6cm by D17.2cm, and flat card measures H17.3cm by W11.9cm. This Mothers Day card is accompanied by a Hallmark branded, White envelope with gold foil lining. Within UK 'Large Letter' Postage Size Limits.
description: From the manufacturer From mums to mummies to grandmas and more, celebrate all those who do the loving, caring and supporting in your life with beautiful cards to suit all tastes and styles. Our promise, to help inspire our customers to live caring, connected lives full of meaningful moments, is something that we take very seriously here at Hallmark. Since 1910, when JC Hall started our company with nothing but two shoeboxes full of picture postcards, we’ve been doing our best to help people celebrate all the special people and special days in their lives.
